info.title: Elux Project Tracker API
info.description: Complete API for the Elux Project Tracker application. Manages goals, projects, tasks, subtasks, comments, documents, templates, time entries, notifications, and user management.

cookieAuth.name: session
cookieAuth.description: Session cookie set after login. Required for all endpoints except /api/auth/login and /api/auth/logout.

post.description: Authenticate with email and password. Sets session cookie on success.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's session info. Requires session cookie.
Returns all goals with enriched owner, labels, KPIs, and linked projects.

post.description: Create a new goal. Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Returns a single goal with full detail including comments and activity.

put.description: Update an existing goal. Requires admin or manager role.

delete.description: Delete a goal. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns all projects with their assignees.

post.description: Create a new project. Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Returns a single project with owner, assignees, child tasks, comments, and activities.

put.description: Update an existing project. Requires admin or manager role. Assignees array replaces all existing assignees.

delete.description: Delete a project. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns all tasks, optionally filtered by projectId, assigneeId, or status.

post.description: Create a new task. Requires authenticated user (admin, manager, or member).

get.description: Returns a single task with subtasks, labels, and comments.

put.description: Update an existing task. Requires authentication. Members can only edit their own tasks. Updates project progress when status changes to done.

403.description: Insufficient permissions (members can only edit own tasks)

delete.description: Delete a task. Admins/managers can delete any task; members can only delete their own.

get.description: Returns both tasks that block this task and tasks that this task blocks.

post.description: Add a dependency between tasks. Validates no circular dependencies. Requires admin or manager role.

delete.description: Remove a specific dependency from a task. Requires admin or manager role.

put.description: Update a subtask's title, done status, due date, assignee, or sort order. Requires authentication.

post.description: Add a comment to a task, project, or goal. Requires authentication.

patch.description: Edit comment text. Only the author or admin can edit. Requires authentication.

delete.description: Delete a comment. Only the author or admin can delete. Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns all documents, optionally filtered by projectId or goalId.

post.description: Create a new document. Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns a single document with author info.

put.description: Update an existing document. Requires authentication.

delete.description: Delete a document. Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Returns templates accessible to the current user (global templates + own templates). Requires authentication.

post.description: Create a new template. Requires admin or manager role.

delete.description: Delete a template. Only the creator or admin can delete. Requires authentication.

post.description: Apply a template to create a task (entityType=task) or project (entityType=epic). Requires admin or manager role.

get.description: Returns all time entries, optionally filtered by taskId or userId.

post.description: Log time against a task. Requires authentication.

delete.description: Delete a time entry. Only the owner or admin can delete. Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns the current user's My Day tasks for a given date. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

200.description: Array of tasks for the day

post.description: Add a task to the current user's My Day for today. If already exists, returns existing entry. Requires authentication.

delete.description: Remove a task from the current user's My Day. Users can only remove their own entries. Requires authentication.

404.description: Not found or not owned by user

get.description: Returns the current user's latest 50 notifications. Requires authentication.

patch.description: Marks all notifications for the current user as read. Requires authentication.
Marks a single notification as read.

get.description: Returns all users (without password hashes).

post.description: Create a new user account. Requires admin role.

400.description: Validation failed (name, email, password, or role issues)

409.description: User with this email already exists

get.description: Returns dashboard stats, critical issues, and recent activity.
Returns all users with their workload stats (todo, in progress, done counts) and capacity status.

200.description: Array of team members with stats

get.summary: Search across tasks, projects, and goals
get.description: Searches by title/name across tasks, projects, and goals. Requires at least 2 characters.
Returns recent activity entries, ordered by most recent first.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of entries to return

get.description: Returns all critical issues.
Returns all tasks assigned to the current user. Requires authentication.

200.description: Array of tasks assigned to current user
